description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The structure features a prominent entryway accessed by a straight walkway, flanked by landscaped gardens and greenery on both sides. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed asymmetrically, providing ample natural light and views of the surrounding outdoor spaces. The rear and side yards include patio areas, outdoor seating, and a small pool, all enclosed by a low perimeter wall for privacy. The roof has a central skylight or open courtyard, adding to the contemporary aesthetic. The exterior is finished in a combination of light and dark tones, with accents of greenery and minimalistic landscaping.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped gardens, and a central skylight. The design features clean lines, outdoor patios, and a private, enclosed yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, walkway, and landscaped gardens on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long facade, large windows, and rear patio area with outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear corner view displaying the pool, patio, and asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: Back view showing the enclosed yard, flat roof, and central skylight or courtyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
